into_the_wild.name: Valby Bakke
into_the_wild.description: A notable hill in Copenhagen that offers scenic views and is a popular spot for locals to visit. It appears to be a well-known destination that changes seasonally with activities like sledding in winter.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Rosenborg Castle
gram_worthy_spots.description: A historic castle in Copenhagen that is a must-see tourist attraction and popular photography destination. Visitors can tour the castle and enjoy its architectural beauty.
